title: Greate
body:
This mod aims to take Gregtech and integrate it with Create, through the use of a gregtech-style tier system.

Shafts & other Kinetic Blocks now have a max capacity, meaning the capacity of a network is dictated by the lowest tier block on the network. If you generate more than the block can support, the entire network will be capped to that block's max capacity.

(In Development): Tiered Machines/Recipes: Most machines will be tiered, and the recipes they can perform will be determined by the tier of the machine.


For KubeJS/datapack support, check the [wiki](https://github.com/GreateBeyondTheHorizon/Greate/wiki)
